entries.name: 密室逃脱插件启动
entries.replaceString:
<script>
(function(){
try{
  var T; try{T=window.top||window}catch(_){T=window}
  var D=T.document||document;
  var KEY='esc2_booted';
  if(T[KEY])return;
  T[KEY]=true;

  var css=D.createElement('style');
  css.textContent=[
    '#esc-btn{position:fixed;bottom:160px;right:16px;z-index:9500;',
      'width:52px;height:52px;border-radius:50%;',
      'background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(30,60,70,0.95),rgba(20,110,110,0.85));',
      'border:1px solid rgba(80,220,210,0.4);',
      'box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(20,150,150,0.4);',
      'display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;',
      'font-size:22px;cursor:pointer;backdrop-filter:blur(10px);',
      'transition:transform .15s;',
    '}',
    '#esc-btn:active{transform:scale(0.93);}',
    '#esc-mask{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:9600;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.55);backdrop-filter:blur(2px);}',
    '#esc-pop{position:fixed;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);',
      'z-index:9700;width:400px;max-width:94vw;max-height:88vh;',
      'background:rgba(8,14,16,0.97);border:1px solid rgba(80,220,210,0.28);',
      'border-radius:18px;padding:16px 18px;overflow-y:auto;',
      'box-shadow:0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.65);color:#e2f2f0;',
      'font-size:13px;line-height:1.65;',
    '}',
    '#esc-pop.esc-shake{animation:esc-shake .4s;}',
    '@keyframes esc-shake{0%,100%{transform:translate(-50%,-50%);}20%{transform:translate(calc(-50% - 8px),-50%);}40%{transform:translate(calc(-50% + 8px),-50%);}60%{transform:translate(calc(-50% - 5px),-50%);}80%{transform:translate(calc(-50% + 5px),-50%);}}',
    '.esc-exit-btn{position:absolute;top:12px;right:14px;width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:50%;',
      'background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);color:#94a3b8;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;',
      'font-size:14px;cursor:pointer;z-index:10;',
    '}',
    '.esc-title{color:#5eead4;font-size:16px;font-weight:800;margin-bottom:6px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;}',
    '.esc-sub{color:#94a3b8;font-size:12px;margin-bottom:14px;line-height:1.6;}',
    '.esc-room-tag{color:#5eead4;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:10px;letter-spacing:.5px;}',
    '.esc-timer{color:#94a3b8;font-size:11px;float:right;}',
    '.esc-bg-wrap{position:relative;width:100%;aspect-ratio:4/3;border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden;',
      'margin-bottom:12px;background:#0a1210;',
      'border:1px solid rgba(80,220,210,0.2);',
    '}',
    '.esc-bg-wrap svg{width:100%;height:100%;display:block;}',
    '.esc-bg-vignette{position:absolute;inset:0;box-shadow:inset 0 0 60px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);pointer-events:none;}',
    '.esc-narration{background:rgba(94,234,212,0.06);border-left:3px solid rgba(94,234,212,0.4);',
      'border-radius:8px;padding:10px 12px;margin-bottom:12px;color:#cdeee8;font-size:12.5px;',
      'font-style:italic;line-height:1.6;animation:esc-fadein .6s ease;',
    '}',
    '@keyframes esc-fadein{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(6px);}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}}',
    '.esc-progress{color:#94a3b8;font-size:11.5px;margin-bottom:8px;}',
    '.esc-hotspot-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px;}',
    '.esc-hotspot{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);border-radius:10px;',
      'padding:10px;cursor:pointer;text-align:center;transition:background .15s,border-color .15s;',
    '}',
    '.esc-hotspot:hover{background:rgba(94,234,212,0.08);}',
    '.esc-hotspot.esc-seen{border-color:rgba(94,234,212,0.4);background:rgba(94,234,212,0.05);}',
    '.esc-hotspot-icon{font-size:22px;margin-bottom:3px;}',
    '.esc-hotspot-label{font-size:11.5px;color:#cbd5e1;}',
    '.esc-clue-box{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);border-radius:10px;padding:10px 12px;margin-bottom:10px;',
      'font-size:12.5px;color:#e2f2f0;line-height:1.6;animation:esc-fadein .4s ease;',
    '}',
    '.esc-clue-icon{color:#5eead4;font-weight:700;margin-right:4px;}',
    '.esc-code-box{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);border-radius:12px;padding:14px;margin-bottom:10px;}',
    '.esc-code-label{color:#94a3b8;font-size:11.5px;margin-bottom:8px;}',
    '.esc-input{width:100%;box-sizing:border-box;padding:12px;border-radius:10px;',
      'border:1px solid rgba(94,234,212,0.3);background:rgba(0,0,0,0.3);color:#5eead4;',
      'font-size:20px;letter-spacing:6px;text-align:center;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:10px;',
    '}',
    '.esc-input.esc-wrong-flash{animation:esc-flash-red .4s;}',
    '@keyframes esc-flash-red{0%,100%{border-color:rgba(94,234,212,0.3);}50%{border-color:rgba(248,113,113,0.9);}}',
    '.esc-btn-main{width:100%;padding:12px;border:none;border-radius:10px;',
      'background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0d9488,#0f766e);color:#fff;font-size:13.5px;',
      'font-weight:800;cursor:pointer;margin-bottom:8px;',
    '}',
    '.esc-btn-main:disabled{opacity:.4;cursor:not-allowed;}',
    '.esc-btn-ghost{width:100%;padding:9px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);border-radius:10px;',
      'background:transparent;color:#94a3b8;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;margin-bottom:8px;',
    '}',
    '.esc-hint-link{color:#5eead4;font-size:11.5px;text-align:center;text-decoration:underline;',
      'cursor:pointer;margin-bottom:10px;display:block;',
    '}',
    '.esc-loading{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:30px 10px;color:#94a3b8;font-size:13px;}',
    '.esc-spin{width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;border:3px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);',
      'border-top-color:#5eead4;animation:esc-spin 0.8s linear infinite;',
    '}',
    '@keyframes esc-spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg);}}',
    '.esc-key-flash{text-align:center;font-size:40px;margin:10px 0;animation:esc-key-pop .6s ease;}',
    '@keyframes esc-key-pop{0%{transform:scale(0);opacity:0;}60%{transform:scale(1.3);opacity:1;}100%{transform:scale(1);}}',
    '.esc-success-banner{text-align:center;font-size:16px;font-weight:900;color:#5eead4;',
      'padding:10px;border-radius:10px;background:rgba(94,234,212,0.1);margin-bottom:12px;',
    '}',
    '.esc-dots{display:flex;gap:5px;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:10px;}',
    '.esc-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15);}',
    '.esc-dot-filled{background:#5eead4;}',
  ].join('');
  D.head.appendChild(css);

  function mk(t,a,p){var e=D.createElement(t);Object.keys(a||{}).forEach(function(k){e[k]=a[k]});if(p)p.appendChild(e);return e;}
  function rm(el){el&&el.parentNode&&el.parentNode.removeChild(el);}

  function toast(msg,dur){
    var el=D.getElementById('esc-toast');
    if(!el){
      el=mk('div',{id:'esc-toast'},D.body);
      el.style.cssText='position:fixed;top:20px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);background:rgba(10,20,20,0.95);color:#e2f2f0;padding:9px 18px;border-radius:20px;font-size:13px;z-index:10000;border:1px solid rgba(94,234,212,0.3);opacity:0;transition:opacity .25s;pointer-events:none;white-space:nowrap;';
    }
    el.textContent=msg;
    el.style.opacity='1'; el.style.top='60px';
    clearTimeout(el._t);
    el._t=setTimeout(function(){ el.style.opacity='0'; el.style.top='20px'; },dur||2200);
  }

  // ---------- 会话号：防止用户退出后，后台还没返回的旧请求把界面重新弹出来 ----------
  var sessionId=0;
  function isStaleSession(id){ return id!==sessionId; }

  function closePop(){ rm(D.getElementById('esc-mask')); rm(D.getElementById('esc-pop')); }

  function openPop(inGame){
    closePop();
    var mask=mk('div',{id:'esc-mask'},D.body);
    mask.addEventListener('click',closePop);
    var pop=mk('div',{id:'esc-pop'},D.body);
    pop.addEventListener('click',function(e){e.stopPropagation();});
    var exitBtn=mk('div',{className:'esc-exit-btn'},pop);
    exitBtn.textContent='✕';
    exitBtn.addEventListener('click',function(e){
      e.stopPropagation();
      if(inGame){ renderExitConfirm(); } else { closePop(); }
    });
    return pop;
  }

  function renderExitConfirm(){
    var mask=mk('div',{id:'esc-exit-mask'},D.body);
    mask.style.cssText='position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:9800;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5);';
    var box=mk('div',{id:'esc-exit-box'},D.body);
    box.style.cssText='position:fixed;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);z-index:9900;'+
      'background:rgba(10,20,20,0.98);border:1px solid rgba(94,234,212,0.3);border-radius:16px;'+
      'padding:18px 20px;width:260px;max-width:85vw;box-shadow:0 12px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);';
    function dismiss(){ rm(mask); rm(box); }
    mask.addEventListener('click',dismiss);
    box.addEventListener('click',function(e){e.stopPropagation();});

    var title=mk('div',{},box);
    title.style.cssText='color:#5eead4;font-weight:800;font-size:14px;margin-bottom:14px;text-align:center;';
    title.textContent='要离开密室吗？';

    var toMenu=mk('button',{className:'esc-btn-main'},box);
    toMenu.textContent='返回入口';
    toMenu.addEventListener('click',function(){ sessionId++; dismiss(); renderIntro(); });

    var toClose=mk('button',{className:'esc-btn-ghost'},box);
    toClose.textContent='关闭游戏页面';
    toClose.addEventListener('click',function(){ sessionId++; dismiss(); closePop(); });
  }

  function buildBtn(){
    if(D.getElementById('esc-btn'))return;
    var btn=mk('div',{id:'esc-btn',title:'密室逃脱'},D.body);
    btn.textContent='🗝️';
    btn.addEventListener('click',function(e){ e.stopPropagation(); renderIntro(); });
  }

  // ---------- 音效（Web Audio 合成，不依赖外部音频文件） ----------
  var audioCtx=null;
  function getAudioCtx(){
    if(!audioCtx){
      try{ var AC=T.AudioContext||T.webkitAudioContext; if(AC) audioCtx=new AC(); }catch(e){}
    }
    if(audioCtx && audioCtx.state==='suspended'){ try{ audioCtx.resume(); }catch(e){} }
    return audioCtx;
  }
  function playTone(freq,duration,type,startDelay,volume){
    var ctx=getAudioCtx();
    if(!ctx) return;
    try{
      var t0=ctx.currentTime+(startDelay||0);
      var osc=ctx.createOscillator();
      var gain=ctx.createGain();
      osc.type=type||'sine';
      osc.frequency.setValueAtTime(freq,t0);
      gain.gain.setValueAtTime(volume||0.12,t0);
      gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001,t0+duration);
      osc.connect(gain); gain.connect(ctx.destination);
      osc.start(t0);
      osc.stop(t0+duration+0.02);
    }catch(e){}
  }
  function sfxClick(){ playTone(600,0.07,'sine',0,0.07); }
  function sfxWrong(){ playTone(220,0.22,'sawtooth',0,0.09); playTone(170,0.28,'sawtooth',0.1,0.09); }
  function sfxCorrect(){ playTone(523,0.12,'sine',0,0.12); playTone(659,0.12,'sine',0.1,0.12); playTone(784,0.22,'sine',0.2,0.14); }
  function sfxKeyFound(){ playTone(880,0.14,'triangle',0,0.14); playTone(1108,0.14,'triangle',0.12,0.14); playTone(1318,0.26,'triangle',0.24,0.16); }
  function sfxDoorOpen(){ playTone(130,0.4,'sawtooth',0,0.07); playTone(95,0.5,'sawtooth',0.15,0.06); }

  // ---------- 超时保护 ----------
  function withTimeout(promise,ms){
    return new Promise(function(resolve){
      var settled=false;
      var timer=setTimeout(function(){ if(!settled){settled=true; resolve(null);} },ms);
      promise.then(function(v){ if(!settled){settled=true; clearTimeout(timer); resolve(v);} })
        .catch(function(){ if(!settled){settled=true; clearTimeout(timer); resolve(null);} });
    });
  }

  // ---------- 画外音旁白（AI生成，带兜底文案；不参与谜题本身） ----------
  var NARRATE_TIMEOUT_MS=12000;
  async function getHostProfile(){
    try{
      var chat=await tavo.chat.current();
      if(chat && Array.isArray(chat.characters) && chat.characters.length){
        var summary=chat.characters[0];
        var full=null;
        try{ full=await tavo.character.get(summary.id); }catch(e){}
        var name=(full && full.name) || summary.name || '神秘的声音';
        var personality=(full && full.personality) ? String(full.personality).slice(0,100) : '';
        return { name:name, personality:personality };
      }
    }catch(e){}
    return { name:'神秘的声音', personality:'' };
  }
  async function narrate(host,instruction,fallbackText){
    try{
      var prompt='你现在扮演一场密室逃脱游戏的主持人/画外音角色"'+host.name+'"'+
        (host.personality?'（性格：'+host.personality+'）':'')+
        '。用简短、有氛围感、略带悬疑的语气，不超过70字，'+instruction+
        '直接输出旁白内容本身，不要输出任何解释、引号或代码块标记。';
      var raw=await withTimeout(tavo.generate(prompt,{context:false}),NARRATE_TIMEOUT_MS);
      var text=(raw||'').trim();
      if(text.indexOf('```')===0){ text=text.replace(/^```[a-zA-Z]*\n?/,'').replace(/```$/,'').trim(); }
      return text || fallbackText;
    }catch(e){
      console.warn('[密室逃脱] 旁白生成失败，使用兜底文案',e);
      return fallbackText;
    }
  }

  // ================= 房间数据（固定谜题，保证逻辑自洽、一定有解） =================
  var ROOMS=[
    {
      name:'废弃书房', icon:'📚',
      bgSvg:'<svg viewBox="0 0 400 300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">'+
        '<defs>'+
        '<radialGradient id="bg1" cx="50%" cy="40%" r="75%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#3a2a1a"/><stop offset="60%" stop-color="#1a1008"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#0a0604"/></radialGradient>'+
        '<radialGradient id="glow1" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="50%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ffcc66" stop-opacity="0.9"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#ffcc66" stop-opacity="0"/></radialGradient>'+
        '<linearGradient id="wood1" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#5c3a20"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#2c1a0c"/></linearGradient>'+
        '</defs>'+
        '<rect width="400" height="300" fill="url(#bg1)"/>'+
        '<g opacity="0.85">'+
        '<rect x="20" y="60" width="360" height="140" fill="#1c120a"/>'+
        '<rect x="30" y="70" width="18" height="120" fill="url(#wood1)"/>'+
        '<rect x="52" y="80" width="14" height="110" fill="url(#wood1)"/>'+
        '<rect x="70" y="65" width="20" height="125" fill="url(#wood1)"/>'+
        '<rect x="94" y="75" width="16" height="115" fill="url(#wood1)"/>'+
        '<rect x="114" y="68" width="18" height="122" fill="url(#wood1)"/>'+
        '<rect x="136" y="78" width="14" height="112" fill="url(#wood1)"/>'+
        '<rect x="270" y="70" width="16" height="120" fill="url(#wood1)"/>'+
        '<rect x="290" y="78" width="20" height="112" fill="url(#wood1)"/>'+
        '<rect x="314" y="65" width="14" height="125" fill="url(#wood1)"/>'+
        '<rect x="332" y="72" width="18" height="118" fill="url(#wood1)"/>'+
        '<rect x="354" y="80" width="16" height="110" fill="url(#wood1)"/>'+
        '</g>'+
        '<rect x="150" y="220" width="120" height="14" fill="#3a2412"/>'+
        '<rect x="160" y="234" width="14" height="46" fill="#2c1a0c"/>'+
        '<rect x="246" y="234" width="14" height="46" fill="#2c1a0c"/>'+
        '<g transform="translate(200,150)">'+
        '<ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="22" ry="30" fill="#241708"/>'+
        '<circle cx="0" cy="-6" r="14" fill="#3a2412" stroke="#6b4a26" stroke-width="1.5"/>'+
        '<line x1="0" y1="-6" x2="0" y2="-14" stroke="#e8c98a" stroke-width="1.5"/>'+
        '<line x1="0" y1="-6" x2="6" y2="-2" stroke="#e8c98a" stroke-width="1.5"/>'+
        '</g>'+
        '<circle cx="300" cy="200" r="55" fill="url(#glow1)"/>'+
        '<rect x="296" y="195" width="8" height="24" fill="#e8c98a"/>'+
        '<ellipse cx="300" cy="188" rx="4" ry="8" fill="#ffb733"/>'+
        '<circle cx="120" cy="100" r="1.5" fill="#e8c98a" opacity="0.5"/>'+
        '<circle cx="220" cy="60" r="1" fill="#e8c98a" opacity="0.4"/>'+
        '<circle cx="340" cy="140" r="1.5" fill="#e8c98a" opacity="0.5"/>'+
        '</svg>',
      introInstruction:'描述玩家推开一扇吱呀作响的门，走进一间尘封已久的书房，需要找到密码打开书桌的暗格。',
      hotspots:[
        {icon:'🕰️',label:'老座钟',clue:'指针永远停在了这个时刻——短针指着的数字，是密码的第1位：3。'},
        {icon:'📚',label:'书架',clue:'第三排书架上，有一本书倒着插放——书脊上烫金印着一个数字，是密码的第2位：7。'},
        {icon:'🖼️',label:'油画',clue:'画中人垂在身侧的手，指尖若隐若现地比出了一个数字，是密码的第3位：2。'},
        {icon:'🧵',label:'地毯',clue:'地毯边缘用暗色丝线绣着几个数字，最后能辨认出的一个，是密码的第4位：9。'},
      ],
      code:'3729',
      escalatedHint:'试着把老座钟、书架、油画和地毯上找到的数字，按发现的顺序拼在一起。',
      keyFoundText:'书桌最底层传来"咔"的一声轻响，一个暗格弹开——钥匙静静躺在里面。',
      successInstruction:'描述暗格弹开、玩家拿到钥匙的瞬间，语气带一丝如释重负和继续深入的悬念。',
    },
    {
      name:'地下实验室', icon:'🧪',
      bgSvg:'<svg viewBox="0 0 400 300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">'+
        '<defs>'+
        '<radialGradient id="bg2" cx="50%" cy="35%" r="80%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#0a2a28"/><stop offset="60%" stop-color="#051614"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#020a09"/></radialGradient>'+
        '<linearGradient id="liquid2" x1="0" y1="1" x2="0" y2="0"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#39ff8f" stop-opacity="0.9"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#39ff8f" stop-opacity="0.1"/></linearGradient>'+
        '<radialGradient id="glow2" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="50%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#39ff8f" stop-opacity="0.5"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#39ff8f" stop-opacity="0"/></radialGradient>'+
        '</defs>'+
        '<rect width="400" height="300" fill="url(#bg2)"/>'+
        '<g stroke="#0f3a36" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.5">'+
        '<line x1="0" y1="260" x2="400" y2="260"/>'+
        '<line x1="0" y1="280" x2="400" y2="280"/>'+
        '<line x1="40" y1="240" x2="40" y2="300"/>'+
        '<line x1="120" y1="240" x2="120" y2="300"/>'+
        '<line x1="200" y1="240" x2="200" y2="300"/>'+
        '<line x1="280" y1="240" x2="280" y2="300"/>'+
        '<line x1="360" y1="240" x2="360" y2="300"/>'+
        '</g>'+
        '<rect x="40" y="150" width="140" height="10" fill="#1a3a36"/>'+
        '<rect x="55" y="120" width="10" height="40" fill="#0a2422" stroke="#2a5a54" stroke-width="1"/>'+
        '<rect x="57" y="140" width="6" height="18" fill="url(#liquid2)"/>'+
        '<rect x="85" y="110" width="10" height="50" fill="#0a2422" stroke="#2a5a54" stroke-width="1"/>'+
        '<rect x="87" y="135" width="6" height="23" fill="url(#liquid2)"/>'+
        '<rect x="115" y="125" width="10" height="35" fill="#0a2422" stroke="#2a5a54" stroke-width="1"/>'+
        '<rect x="117" y="142" width="6" height="16" fill="url(#liquid2)"/>'+
        '<rect x="145" y="115" width="10" height="45" fill="#0a2422" stroke="#2a5a54" stroke-width="1"/>'+
        '<rect x="147" y="138" width="6" height="20" fill="url(#liquid2)"/>'+
        '<circle cx="290" cy="180" r="50" fill="url(#glow2)"/>'+
        '<ellipse cx="290" cy="200" rx="34" ry="10" fill="#0a2422" stroke="#39ff8f" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.8"/>'+
        '<line x1="0" y1="40" x2="400" y2="40" stroke="#1a3a36" stroke-width="6"/>'+
        '<line x1="60" y1="40" x2="60" y2="90" stroke="#1a3a36" stroke-width="6"/>'+
        '<line x1="320" y1="40" x2="320" y2="90" stroke="#1a3a36" stroke-width="6"/>'+
        '</svg>',
      introInstruction:'描述玩家踏入一间废弃的地下实验室，空气中弥漫着刺鼻的化学品气味，需要破解一组和化学元素编号有关的密码。',
      hotspots:[
        {icon:'🧫',label:'破损的周期表',clue:'墙上贴着一张被腐蚀得残破的元素周期表，只能辨认出这几个编号：C=6，O=8，H=1，N=7。'},
        {icon:'🧪',label:'试管架',clue:'一支试管上贴着手写标签，写着一串化学式般的组合："C - O - H - N"。'},
        {icon:'🔬',label:'显微镜',clue:'目镜里似乎藏着什么，但你反复调整焦距，什么也没看清——或许这只是个障眼法，与密码无关。'},
        {icon:'🔒',label:'保险柜',clue:'保险柜上有一个4位数字键盘，旁边刻着一行小字："元素之序，即为密钥"。'},
      ],
      code:'6817',
      escalatedHint:'试着把试管上写的那串化学式"C-O-H-N"，按元素周期表残片给出的编号，一个个换成数字，按顺序拼起来。',
      keyFoundText:'保险柜"哐当"一声弹开，钥匙就压在一叠泛黄的实验记录下面。',
      successInstruction:'描述保险柜弹开、玩家从实验记录下取出钥匙的瞬间，语气带一点科研悬疑感。',
    },
    {
      name:'镜厅', icon:'🪞',
      bgSvg:'<svg viewBox="0 0 400 300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">'+
        '<defs>'+
        '<radialGradient id="bg3" cx="50%" cy="35%" r="80%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#241332"/><stop offset="60%" stop-color="#12081c"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#05030a"/></radialGradient>'+
        '<linearGradient id="mirror3" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#8a7fc9" stop-opacity="0.5"/><stop offset="45%" stop-color="#3a2a5a" stop-opacity="0.3"/><stop offset="55%" stop-color="#c9b9ff" stop-opacity="0.4"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#3a2a5a" stop-opacity="0.3"/></linearGradient>'+
        '<radialGradient id="glow3" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="50%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ffcc99" stop-opacity="0.8"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#ffcc99" stop-opacity="0"/></radialGradient>'+
        '</defs>'+
        '<rect width="400" height="300" fill="url(#bg3)"/>'+
        '<rect x="20" y="40" width="70" height="160" rx="6" fill="url(#mirror3)" stroke="#6a5a9a" stroke-width="3"/>'+
        '<rect x="110" y="20" width="80" height="190" rx="6" fill="url(#mirror3)" stroke="#6a5a9a" stroke-width="3"/>'+
        '<rect x="210" y="30" width="75" height="175" rx="6" fill="url(#mirror3)" stroke="#6a5a9a" stroke-width="3"/>'+
        '<rect x="305" y="45" width="70" height="155" rx="6" fill="url(#mirror3)" stroke="#6a5a9a" stroke-width="3"/>'+
        '<polygon points="230,90 260,70 250,120 220,110" fill="url(#mirror3)" stroke="#6a5a9a" stroke-width="2"/>'+
        '<rect x="170" y="230" width="60" height="20" fill="#1c1428"/>'+
        '<rect x="180" y="215" width="40" height="18" fill="#26192e"/>'+
        '<ellipse cx="200" cy="215" rx="18" ry="5" fill="#0f0a16"/>'+
        '<circle cx="150" cy="240" r="45" fill="url(#glow3)"/>'+
        '<rect x="147" y="235" width="6" height="18" fill="#e8c98a"/>'+
        '<ellipse cx="150" cy="228" rx="3" ry="6" fill="#ffb733"/>'+
        '</svg>',
      introInstruction:'描述玩家走进一间四面都是镜子的诡异大厅，烛光的影子在镜中无限延伸，需要破解一个和镜像有关的谜题。',
      hotspots:[
        {icon:'🪞',label:'正面的镜子',clue:'镜子里，你看到身后的墙上倒映出一串数字："2591"——但那面墙上，其实什么都没有写。'},
        {icon:'🕯️',label:'烛台',clue:'蜡烛的影子在墙上摇曳，隐约拼出一句话："镜中所见，皆为倒影"。'},
        {icon:'🔨',label:'破碎的镜子碎片',clue:'碎片反射出扭曲的画面，似乎在提示你——眼见未必为实，答案要倒过来看。'},
        {icon:'🗿',label:'石台机关',clue:'石台中央有一个凹槽和一个4位数字输入口，静静等待着答案。'},
      ],
      code:'1952',
      escalatedHint:'镜子里看到的那串数字是"倒影"——试着把"2591"倒过来读一遍。',
      keyFoundText:'石台中央的凹槽缓缓下沉，一声机关转动的轻响后，钥匙缓缓浮现了出来。',
      successInstruction:'描述石台机关开启、钥匙浮现的瞬间，语气带一点解谜后的释然，同时暗示这是最后一关。',
    },
  ];

  // ================= 游戏状态与流程 =================
  var gameState=null;

  function renderIntro(){
    var pop=openPop();
    var title=mk('div',{className:'esc-title'},pop);
    title.textContent='🗝️ 密室逃脱';
    var sub=mk('div',{className:'esc-sub'},pop);
    sub.textContent='当前角色将作为这场游戏的画外音主持人，一步步引导你探索。共 3 关密室，每关都藏着一把钥匙，找齐线索、破解密码，才能找到它。';

    var dots=mk('div',{className:'esc-dots'},pop);
    ROOMS.forEach(function(r){ mk('div',{className:'esc-dot'},dots); });

    var startBtn=mk('button',{className:'esc-btn-main'},pop);
    startBtn.textContent='🕯️ 推开门，开始游戏';
    startBtn.addEventListener('click',startGame);

    var cancel=mk('button',{className:'esc-btn-ghost'},pop);
    cancel.textContent='关闭';
    cancel.addEventListener('click',closePop);
  }

  async function startGame(){
    var mySession=sessionId;
    renderLoading('推开门……');
    var host=await getHostProfile();
    if(isStaleSession(mySession)) return;
    gameState={
      roomIndex:0,
      host:host,
      hotspotsSeen:[[],[],[]],
      wrongAttempts:[0,0,0],
      firstWrongNarrated:[false,false,false],
      startTime:Date.now(),
    };
    await enterRoom(0);
  }

  function renderLoading(msg){
    var pop=openPop(true);
    var box=mk('div',{className:'esc-loading'},pop);
    mk('div',{className:'esc-spin'},box);
    var t=mk('div',{},box); t.textContent=msg;
  }

  function formatElapsed(){
    var s=Math.floor((Date.now()-gameState.startTime)/1000);
    var m=Math.floor(s/60);
    var ss=s%60;
    return (m<10?'0':'')+m+':'+(ss<10?'0':'')+ss;
  }

  async function enterRoom(idx){
    var mySession=sessionId;
    var room=ROOMS[idx];
    renderLoading((idx===0?'门缓缓打开……':'走向下一扇门……'));
    var narrationText=await narrate(
      gameState.host,
      room.introInstruction,
      '你推开门，走进了"'+room.name+'"。四周弥漫着说不清的气息，线索就藏在这个房间的某个角落。'
    );
    if(isStaleSession(mySession)) return;
    sfxDoorOpen();
    renderRoomScreen(idx,narrationText);
  }

  function renderRoomScreen(idx,narrationText){
    var room=ROOMS[idx];
    var pop=openPop(true);

    var roomTag=mk('div',{className:'esc-room-tag'},pop);
    roomTag.textContent='第 '+(idx+1)+' / '+ROOMS.length+' 关 · '+room.icon+' '+room.name;
    var timerEl=mk('span',{className:'esc-timer'},roomTag);
    timerEl.textContent='⏱ '+formatElapsed();

    var bgWrap=mk('div',{className:'esc-bg-wrap'},pop);
    bgWrap.innerHTML=room.bgSvg;
    mk('div',{className:'esc-bg-vignette'},bgWrap);

    if(narrationText){
      var narr=mk('div',{className:'esc-narration'},pop);
      narr.textContent='"'+narrationText+'"';
    }

    var seen=gameState.hotspotsSeen[idx];
    var prog=mk('div',{className:'esc-progress'},pop);
    prog.textContent='🔍 已探索线索 '+seen.length+' / '+room.hotspots.length;

    var grid=mk('div',{className:'esc-hotspot-grid'},pop);
    room.hotspots.forEach(function(hs,hi){
      var card=mk('div',{className:'esc-hotspot'+(seen.indexOf(hi)!==-1?' esc-seen':'')},grid);
      mk('div',{className:'esc-hotspot-icon'},card).textContent=hs.icon;
      mk('div',{className:'esc-hotspot-label'},card).textContent=hs.label;
      card.addEventListener('click',function(){
        sfxClick();
        if(seen.indexOf(hi)===-1) seen.push(hi);
        renderRoomScreen(idx,narrationText);
        showClueInline(hs);
      });
    });

    var clueSlot=mk('div',{id:'esc-clue-slot'},pop);
    // 如果之前点开过某条线索，这里不重复自动展开，靠玩家再次点击查看

    var codeBox=mk('div',{className:'esc-code-box'},pop);
    mk('div',{className:'esc-code-label'},codeBox).textContent='输入 4 位密码：';
    var input=mk('input',{className:'esc-input',type:'tel',maxLength:4,inputmode:'numeric',placeholder:'••••'},codeBox);

    var hintLink=mk('div',{className:'esc-hint-link'},codeBox);
    hintLink.textContent='需要提示？';
    hintLink.addEventListener('click',function(){
      sfxClick();
      showEscalatedHint(idx);
    });

    var submitBtn=mk('button',{className:'esc-btn-main'},codeBox);
    submitBtn.textContent='尝试开锁';
    submitBtn.addEventListener('click',function(){ trySubmitCode(idx,input.value.trim()); });

    function showClueInline(hs){
      clueSlot.innerHTML='';
      var box=mk('div',{className:'esc-clue-box'},clueSlot);
      var icon=mk('span',{className:'esc-clue-icon'},box); icon.textContent=hs.icon;
      box.appendChild(D.createTextNode(hs.clue));
    }
  }

  function showEscalatedHint(idx){
    var room=ROOMS[idx];
    var seen=gameState.hotspotsSeen[idx];
    var clueSlot=D.getElementById('esc-clue-slot');
    if(!clueSlot) return;
    clueSlot.innerHTML='';
    var box=mk('div',{className:'esc-clue-box'},clueSlot);
    var icon=mk('span',{className:'esc-clue-icon'},box); icon.textContent='💡';
    if(seen.length<room.hotspots.length){
      box.appendChild(D.createTextNode('这个房间似乎还有些地方没仔细看过，多探索几个物品吧。'));
    } else {
      box.appendChild(D.createTextNode(room.escalatedHint));
    }
  }

  async function trySubmitCode(idx,value){
    var room=ROOMS[idx];
    if(value===room.code){
      sfxCorrect();
      await onRoomSolved(idx);
    } else {
      sfxWrong();
      gameState.wrongAttempts[idx]++;
      var pop=D.getElementById('esc-pop');
      if(pop){ pop.classList.remove('esc-shake'); void pop.offsetWidth; pop.classList.add('esc-shake'); }
      var input=D.querySelector('.esc-input');
      if(input){ input.classList.remove('esc-wrong-flash'); void input.offsetWidth; input.classList.add('esc-wrong-flash'); input.value=''; }
      toast('❌ 密码不对，再想想…');

      if(gameState.wrongAttempts[idx]>=2){
        showEscalatedHint(idx);
      }
      if(!gameState.firstWrongNarrated[idx]){
        gameState.firstWrongNarrated[idx]=true;
        var mySession=sessionId;
        var text=await narrate(gameState.host,'玩家刚才输入的密码不对，用一句话给出略带调侃或神秘感的反应，不要透露答案。','"不是这个……再仔细找找吧。"');
        if(isStaleSession(mySession)) return;
        toast(text,3000);
      }
    }
  }

  async function onRoomSolved(idx){
    var mySession=sessionId;
    var room=ROOMS[idx];
    var pop=openPop(true);
    var roomTag=mk('div',{className:'esc-room-tag'},pop);
    roomTag.textContent='第 '+(idx+1)+' / '+ROOMS.length+' 关 · '+room.icon+' '+room.name;

    var banner=mk('div',{className:'esc-success-banner'},pop);
    banner.textContent='🔓 密码正确！';
    mk('div',{className:'esc-key-flash'},pop).textContent='🗝️';

    var keyBox=mk('div',{className:'esc-clue-box'},pop);
    keyBox.textContent=room.keyFoundText;

    var narrSlot=mk('div',{id:'esc-narr-slot'},pop);
    var loadingHint=mk('div',{className:'esc-hint','id':'esc-narr-loading'},pop);
    loadingHint.style.color='#94a3b8'; loadingHint.style.fontSize='11px';
    loadingHint.textContent=gameState.host.name+' 的声音在耳边响起…';

    sfxKeyFound();

    var isLast=idx===ROOMS.length-1;
    var text=await narrate(gameState.host,room.successInstruction,
      isLast?'钥匙到手了。所有的门，终于都为你打开了。':'钥匙到手了。但故事还没有结束，下一扇门在等着你。');
    if(isStaleSession(mySession)) return;
    rm(D.getElementById('esc-narr-loading'));
    var narr=mk('div',{className:'esc-narration'},narrSlot);
    narr.textContent='"'+text+'"';

    var nextBtn=mk('button',{className:'esc-btn-main'},pop);
    nextBtn.textContent=isLast?'查看通关结果':'推开下一扇门';
    nextBtn.addEventListener('click',function(){
      if(isLast){ renderGameComplete(); }
      else { enterRoom(idx+1); }
    });
  }

  async function renderGameComplete(){
    var mySession=sessionId;
    sfxDoorOpen();
    var pop=openPop(true);
    var title=mk('div',{className:'esc-title'},pop);
    title.textContent='🏆 密室通关！';
    var timeBox=mk('div',{className:'esc-success-banner'},pop);
    timeBox.textContent='用时 '+formatElapsed();

    var loadingHint=mk('div',{},pop);
    loadingHint.style.cssText='color:#94a3b8;font-size:11px;margin-bottom:8px;';
    loadingHint.textContent=gameState.host.name+' 的声音在耳边响起…';

    var text=await narrate(gameState.host,
      '玩家已经找齐了三把钥匙，成功走出了这座密室，用一段简短的结语收尾，带一点余韵或反转的暗示。',
      '三把钥匙终于集齐——门在你面前缓缓开启。这场游戏结束了，但有些谜团，或许才刚刚开始。');
    if(isStaleSession(mySession)) return;
    rm(loadingHint);
    var narr=mk('div',{className:'esc-narration'},pop);
    narr.textContent='"'+text+'"';

    var replay=mk('button',{className:'esc-btn-main'},pop);
    replay.textContent='再挑战一次';
    replay.addEventListener('click',startGame);

    var back=mk('button',{className:'esc-btn-ghost'},pop);
    back.textContent='返回入口';
    back.addEventListener('click',renderIntro);
  }

  buildBtn();
  console.log('[密室逃脱插件v2] 已加载');

}catch(e){console.error('[密室逃脱插件]',e);}
})();
</script>
